title: Delayed Despawn
description: This Datapack increases the default despawn timer from 5 to 10 minutes.
body:
# Delayed Despawn Datapack for Minecraft Java Edition 

## 📖 About

Have you ever gone caving and got blown up by a Creeper? Did you lose all your items despite claiming you arrived within 5 minutes? This Datapack aims to fix that worry!

## 📝 Features

This small lightweight datapack changes the normal 5-minute despawn timer to 10 minutes so you can retrieve your items easier. 

_A update future will include a toggleable ability to make items that are close to despawning glow and/or emit a sound to help you find them easier, however this will not be included in Version 1.0.0_

_Be sure to keep an eye on the changelog to see when these features get added!_

## ❗Important Information

This Datapack will cause extra lag on servers as it applies the 10-minute despawn timer to **all** items, not only ones dropped by players on death. 

## 📂 Installation
Be sure to install this Datapack to the right location or it will not work properly. 

The _correct_ file path is **saves/[world]/datapacks** 

## ℹ️ Extra Information
I now have a Ko-fi link located on the pack’s Modrinth page on the sidebar, but always remember donations are appreciated, but **never** required.

## 👾 Issues
Please report any issues to the Discord located in the Links tab, or on the Planet Minecraft page.
